# Description

Cancelled by the 2026-04 pre-ACP archive pass. The Continue prompt-tag surface line was superseded and archived.


# [PKT-PRV-019](task-0086): Provider Tracing

## Purpose

Implement provider tracing.

## Scope

- Trace format
- Propagation
- Analysis

## Implementation

1. Define format
2. Add propagation
3. Add analysis

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Format defined
2. Propagation works
3. Analysis works
